nodes.context: Predominantly white organized crime enterprise founded in prison, active in Maryland and other states.
Prison gang that gave permission for DMI to form and initially employed DMI for services.

edges.evidence_quote: Roark was a close associate of the Black Guerrilla Family and received permission from them to start an organization to unite white inmates in the system.
edges.context: DMI was founded with permission from BGF and initially worked for BGF.

edges.evidence_quote: Initially, DMI worked for the BGF, but soon began offering those services to other gangs by targeting rivals and correctional staff.
edges.context: DMI initially worked for BGF, indicating a cooperative relationship.
Infobox lists BGF as an ally of DMI.
